name: Signalers
motto: When the signal breaks, we reconnect.
description: Specialists in communication, radio clues, and decoding messages.
latestTransmission: Keep the static low and the channels clear.

name: Lanterns
motto: We carry light into the unknown.
description: Specialists in courage, spirit, and night missions.
latestTransmission: Light discipline active. Night watch secured.

name: Gatekeepers
motto: Hold the line. Close the Gate.
description: Specialists in discipline, protection, and strategic control.

name: Trackers
description: Specialists in observation, tracking, and investigation.
latestTransmission: Footprints found east of the Safe Zone.
